title: pilosella albulana subsp. floccosa
intro: Pilosella albulana subsp. floccosa, also known as a flowering plant species within the dandelion family, is a subspecies of Pilosella albulana. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella albulana subsp. floccosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues, such as bloating and gastritis, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pilosella albulana subsp. floccosa can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
